title: GOD Armour
description: Adds a set of GOD Armour to the game.
body:
# Info:
Adds a set of netherite GOD Armour to minecraft which is unbreakable. The helmet gives the user permanent fire resistance and invisiblity. The chestplate gives a bonus ten hearts. The leggings give resistance 1. The boots gives permanent speed 1 and doplhin's grace 1. This plugin could be used in pvp servers as event items or be similar to a race to the mace which is common in most pvp servers.

# How to use:
By deafult you can do /godboots, /godhelemet etc if you have operator to get each peice but you can use [Rituals & Crafting rituals](https://modrinth.com/plugin/rituals-crafting-rituals) to make rituals on craft or just in general and [custom crafting](https://modrinth.com/plugin/customcrafting) to add recipes for them.
